title: Panama Canal Tour
description: Experience the world-renowned Panama Canal. A guided tour of the Miraflores Locks to witness the magnificent engineering in action.

title: Welcome Cocktails
description: Sunset drinks at the rooftop lounge. Meet, mingle, and toast to the journey ahead in Panama City.

title: Casco Viejo Tour
description: A guided morning walk through the historic charm of Casco Viejo, followed by local gourmet coffee.

title: Intimate Dinner
description: An intimate pre-birthday dinner with closest friends and family. Stories, laughter, and memories.

title: The 40th Birthday Party
description: The main event! An evening of dinner, dancing, and celebration. Gold and glamour encouraged.
location: Sheraton Grand, Panama. Room - Taboga Ballroom.

title: Farewell Brunch
description: A relaxed brunch to say goodbye and recap the unforgettable weekend before departures.
